The genus Orthochilus is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae, and this orchid is native to tropical Africa. This orchid is also known as the 'Table Mountain Orchid' due to its unique habitat in South Africa. The classification of Orthochilus tabularis reflects its distinct characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.
